name: Radio Online
description: Automated online radio streaming plugin using Liquidsoap. Stream audio to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling via Liquidsoap Telnet control.
overview: Automated online radio streaming via Liquidsoap to Icecast servers with weekly playlist scheduling. Assign Jellyfin playlists to specific day/time slots. Requires a Liquidsoap Docker container running alongside Jellyfin.

versions.changelog:
FIX: Telnet connection now works after config change - hosted service actively attempts connection instead of infinite retry loop
FIX: Status endpoint now updates connection settings before testing Liquidsoap
FIX: Liquidsoap bind_addr must be server.telnet.bind_addr (not server.telnet.address)
NOTE: If Jellyfin runs in Docker bridge and Liquidsoap in host mode, set Telnet Host to Docker gateway IP (e.g. 172.20.0.1)
